completed_tasks.name: yubitui feedback: configurable theme cycle key + on_theme_changed callback
yubitui feedback: fix default theme key Ctrl+T -> F5 (macOS SIGINFO + Windows Terminal conflict)
yubitui feedback: document Reactive<T>: PartialEq bound

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 09: Complex Widgets — plan and execute

decisions.decision: Theme cycle key default changed from Ctrl+T to F5
decisions.rationale: Ctrl+T intercepted at OS level on macOS (stty SIGINFO) and Windows Terminal (new tab). F5 has no common terminal binding.

decisions.decision: on_theme_changed callback added to App as Option<Box<dyn Fn(&str)>>
decisions.rationale: Simplest API for persist-theme use case yubitui needs; avoids event dispatch complexity

next_action: Run /gsd:plan-phase 9 to plan Complex Widgets phase
context_notes: Phase 08 fully verified (9/9 must-haves). Paused mid-session to address yubitui real-world feedback before continuing to phase 9. All feedback items resolved. Phase 9 is unplanned — start with /gsd:plan-phase 9.
